name: youtube-config
title: Video & Transcript Source (YouTube)
description: MCP connector for fetching video metadata and transcripts for talks/interviews (useful for sourcing Rory Sutherland TED talks and interviews).

auth.notes: Provide YouTube Data API key for quota-bound access to video search and captions.

exampleUsage: Search for 'Rory Sutherland TED' and return transcripts for quick citation.
